Bill Ackman: 'Dealmaker' Donald Trump Is Key To Avoiding World War 3
data.description: Ackman has historically been a Democratic political donor. He said Wednesday on CNBC's "Squawk Box" that he's voted for a lot more Democrats than Republicans, but that won't be the case this time around.

data.title: 'It's The First Step, Not The Final Step': Cannabis Rescheduling Push Gains Broad Support
data.description: Dutchie calls for rescheduling of cannabis as first step towards federal normalization at the Benzinga Cannabis Capital Conference. Future outlook and Dutchie's role in supporting businesses discussed.
